outages.boundary: Merapi Rd to Senator Highway and Spur Lane to Friendly Pines Trail
outages.comments: Severe weather in the area has damaged equipment. We are working to restore power as quickly and safely as possible.

outages.boundary: Forest Ave to College Ave and Grandview Dr to Mcallister Ave
outages.comments: We are working to restore the power outage caused by temporary problems with our equipment.
